Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Million Hearts® CVD Risk Reduction Model Medicare Data Files Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 34 

PATIENT_SEX 

LABEL: Patient's Sex 

DESCRIPTION: Patient's sex. 

SHORT NAME: PATIENT_SEX 

LONG NAME: PATIENT_SEX 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Demographic 
Alignment (final and EVAA cycle files) 

SOURCE: Million Hearts Data Registry 

VALUES: M = male 
F = female 
Null/missing 

COMMENT: In 2025, this field was renamed to sex to
